hooks.command: PANE_ID=$(/opt/homebrew/bin/wezterm cli list --format json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(next((str(p['pane_id']) for p in d if p.get('tty_name')=='$(tty)'), ''))" 2>/dev/null) && [[ -n $PANE_ID ]] && mkdir -p ~/.cache/claude-status && printf '{"status":"idle","project":"%s","start_time":%s,"pane_id":"%s"}' "${PWD##*/}" "$(date +%s)" "$PANE_ID" > ~/.cache/claude-status/pane-$PANE_ID.json && printf '\033]1337;SetUserVar=%s=%s\007' claude_status $(printf '%s' idle | base64) || true

PANE_ID=$(/opt/homebrew/bin/wezterm cli list --format json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(next((str(p['pane_id']) for p in d if p.get('tty_name')=='$(tty)'), ''))" 2>/dev/null) && [[ -n $PANE_ID ]] && mkdir -p ~/.cache/claude-status && printf '{"status":"working","project":"%s","start_time":%s,"pane_id":"%s"}' "${PWD##*/}" "$(date +%s)" "$PANE_ID" > ~/.cache/claude-status/pane-$PANE_ID.json && printf '\033]1337;SetUserVar=%s=%s\007' claude_status $(printf '%s' working | base64) || true

PANE_ID=$(/opt/homebrew/bin/wezterm cli list --format json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(next((str(p['pane_id']) for p in d if p.get('tty_name')=='$(tty)'), ''))" 2>/dev/null) && [[ -n $PANE_ID ]] && mkdir -p ~/.cache/claude-status && printf '{"status":"attention","attention_type":"permission","project":"%s","start_time":%s,"pane_id":"%s"}' "${PWD##*/}" "$(date +%s)" "$PANE_ID" > ~/.cache/claude-status/pane-$PANE_ID.json && printf '\033]1337;SetUserVar=%s=%s\007' claude_status $(printf '%s' attention | base64) && terminal-notifier -title 'Permission Needed' -message "Approve in ${PWD##*/}" -group "$PWD:perm" -sound Basso -execute "/opt/homebrew/bin/wezterm cli activate-pane --pane-id $PANE_ID" -activate com.github.wez.wezterm || true

PANE_ID=$(/opt/homebrew/bin/wezterm cli list --format json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(next((str(p['pane_id']) for p in d if p.get('tty_name')=='$(tty)'), ''))" 2>/dev/null) && [[ -n $PANE_ID ]] && mkdir -p ~/.cache/claude-status && printf '{"status":"attention","attention_type":"input","project":"%s","start_time":%s,"pane_id":"%s"}' "${PWD##*/}" "$(date +%s)" "$PANE_ID" > ~/.cache/claude-status/pane-$PANE_ID.json && printf '\033]1337;SetUserVar=%s=%s\007' claude_status $(printf '%s' attention | base64) && terminal-notifier -title 'Claude Waiting' -message "Needs input in ${PWD##*/}" -group "$PWD:input" -sound Basso -execute "/opt/homebrew/bin/wezterm cli activate-pane --pane-id $PANE_ID" -activate com.github.wez.wezterm || true

PANE_ID=$(/opt/homebrew/bin/wezterm cli list --format json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(next((str(p['pane_id']) for p in d if p.get('tty_name')=='$(tty)'), ''))" 2>/dev/null) && [[ -n $PANE_ID ]] && mkdir -p ~/.cache/claude-status && printf '{"status":"idle","project":"%s","start_time":%s,"pane_id":"%s"}' "${PWD##*/}" "$(date +%s)" "$PANE_ID" > ~/.cache/claude-status/pane-$PANE_ID.json && printf '\033]1337;SetUserVar=%s=%s\007' claude_status $(printf '%s' idle | base64) && terminal-notifier -title 'Claude Done' -message "Done in ${PWD##*/}" -group "$PWD" -sound default -execute "/opt/homebrew/bin/wezterm cli activate-pane --pane-id $PANE_ID" -activate com.github.wez.wezterm || true
